description: Expected goat-flow project structure. Source of truth for setup, scanner, and upgrade paths. Not a JSON Schema — this is a manifest of what should exist on disk.

directory_purposes..goat-flow/tasks/: Milestone files, plans, and workspace-local task artifacts. Do not recreate the legacy todo or handoff scratch files.

optional_files._note: Optional local instructions are a later optimisation pass, not base setup. Prefer existing project docs first; otherwise derive these files from observed codebase patterns rather than generic templates.
Optional universal project contract added after setup.
optional_files..goat-flow/coding-standards/backend.md: Optional backend-specific conventions added after setup.
optional_files..goat-flow/coding-standards/frontend.md: Optional frontend-specific conventions added after setup.
optional_files..goat-flow/coding-standards/security.md: Optional project-local security rules added after setup.
optional_files..goat-flow/coding-standards/testing.md: Optional project-local testing rules added after setup.

toolchain.description: Detected project commands grouped by purpose. Each field is an array of shell commands.

ask_first.description: Structured high-risk boundaries for dispatcher and setup context.
